benefits.title: The Advantages of Traveling With Us
benefits.subtitle: More than an agency, we are your travel partner.
items: Continuous support before, during, and after the trip

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Adventure?
cta.subtitle: Talk to one of our experts or explore our destinations and discover your next great itinerary.

hero.title: Travel Solutions Tailored For You
hero.subtitle: From complete packages to unique experiences, we design every detail to create your perfect trip. Your adventure starts here.

mainServices.title: Our Main Services
mainServices.subtitle: Everything you need for a smooth and unforgettable journey, organized by experts.

packages.title: Travel Packages
packages.description: Complete packages with flights, hotels, and activities. The ideal option for those seeking convenience and the best value.

flights.title: Flights
flights.description: Find and book flights to any destination with the best rates and schedules.

hotels.title: Hotel Bookings
hotels.description: Access a vast selection of hotels worldwide, from the most luxurious to the most budget-friendly.

transfers.title: Transfers & Transport
transfers.description: Secure your transport from the airport to the hotel and between cities with total comfort and safety.

cruises.title: Cruises
cruises.description: Explore multiple destinations in a single trip aboard the world's best cruise ships.

localGuides.title: Local Guides
localGuides.description: Discover the secrets of each destination with experienced local guides who speak your language.

insurance.title: Travel Insurance
insurance.description: Protect your trip against unforeseen events with our complete and reliable travel insurance.

process.title: How It Works?
process.subtitle: Our process is simple, transparent, and focused on you.

step1.title: Get Inspired
step1.description: Explore our destinations and packages or tell us your idea.

step2.title: Planning
step2.description: One of our specialists will contact you to design a tailor-made itinerary.

step3.title: Booking
step3.description: After your approval, we handle all bookings and details.

step4.title: Travel!
step4.description: Enjoy your trip knowing we have everything under control.

specializedServices.title: Specialized Trips
specializedServices.subtitle: We create themed experiences for travelers with specific passions.

honeymoon.title: Honeymoons
honeymoon.description: Romantic destinations and unforgettable experiences to celebrate love.

groupTravel.title: Group Travel
groupTravel.description: We organize trips for groups of friends, families, or companies.

culturalExchange.title: Cultural Exchange
culturalExchange.description: Live like a local and immerse yourself in new cultures with our immersion trips.

photoTourism.title: Photo Tourism
photoTourism.description: Capture stunning landscapes with our photography-focused itineraries.
